title: Did they dub Rebuild yet Anyone know
display_title: Did they dub Rebuild yet Anyone know
wikitext:
[]: Did they dub Rebuild yet? Anyone know?             Quote Post by Evangelion3491 » Mon Sep 08, 2008 8:04 pm I watched the show in dubs, and I would like to see the film in dubs, as it is hard to watch it in subs after seeing the show like 6 times in English! If they did dub it, that means that a release shouldn't be too far off.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 08, 2008 8:12 pm NOOOOBOOODDYYYY KNOOOOOOWSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSS. Chances are it's NOT dubbed however seeing as there isn't any news on who'd release it in the States/etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion3491 » Mon Sep 08, 2008 8:18 pm Okay, thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 08, 2008 8:51 pm It will not be dub'd for a long, long time. Also, it isn't that hard to read, but it might be for you. [/jk] Oh, and welcome to evageeks.org!!!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 09, 2008 6:56 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: NOOOOBOOODDYYYY KNOOOOOOWSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSS.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 09, 2008 10:03 am I would wager good monies that Rebuild will not be licensed until all of the films have been produced and released to DVD in Japan. The reason is a very obvious practicality issue. Any company, be it ADV or Manga, will want to have as much of the original cast return to reprise their roles to keep the previous dub fans (the largest segment) happy. They will not want to do each movie individually. They will not want to have to bring people for all over the place to do one movie, then another, then another, then another. They'll do all four at the same time, one character at a time. PRAY IT IS NOT MANGA ENTERTAINMENT. If ADV gets it, we might actually see the thing on DVD before 2015. And no, that's not a gross exaggeration. The End of Evangelion Released in Japan: 1997 Released in English: 2002 (5 years later. They had the license for at least 3 years) Rebuild of Evangelion 1: 2007 2: 2008 (maybe) 3: 2009 (maybe) 4: 2009, 2010 (lol whut?) Release in english by manga entertainment: 2015 (5 years later) By the way, WHATEVER HAPPENED TO THE RENEWAL EOE DVD THEY SAID THEY WOULD PUT OUT? I THINK ITS A HOAX. AMIRITE?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Sep 09, 2008 10:33 am The Eva Monkey wrote: WHATEVER HAPPENED TO THE RENEWAL EOE DVD THEY SAID THEY WOULD PUT OUT? I THINK ITS A HOAX. AMIRITE?

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Sep 09, 2008 3:14 pm >_> <_< German dub is out next month...

[]: Re: Did they dub Rebuild yet? Anyone know?             Quote Post by simon » Tue Sep 09, 2008 3:40 pm Evangelion3491 wrote: as it is hard to watch it in subs after seeing the show like 6 times in English!

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Sep 09, 2008 3:47 pm JimmyWolk wrote: >_> <_< German dub is out next month...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Sep 09, 2008 3:54 pm JimmyWolk wrote: >_> <_< German dub is out next month...

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Sep 09, 2008 4:07 pm ( tries to crawl to safety but is shot again by Jimmy Wolk )

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Sep 09, 2008 4:32 pm I actually have some faith in this one. At least a German company is responsible this time with Ufa, not a US one over the UK (ADV for the series) or an Italian one (Panini for the movies). Rei's and Misato's VAs have changed, will have to see if for the better (was mostly indifferent about Rei's and while I think Misato's did a good job, I never found the voice very fitting). Kinda doubt I can afford the Steelbook (apparently the only version at first) with my current finances though. :(

[]: Re: Did they dub Rebuild yet? Anyone know?             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:22 pm Evangelion3491 wrote: I watched the show in dubs

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:29 pm A German dub? I wonder how the Asuka's German goes in those parts?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:34 pm How many languages is Evangelion currently dubbed in?

[]:             Quote Post by Super Chris » Thu Oct 16, 2008 12:23 am I also hope that Manga doesn't get it. But I doubt they will. How much money can they have from sitting on licenses without releasing most of them? Actually, I wouldn't mind if Bandai got it in the US. I say they've been doing really well lately, and the stuff they've been including as bonuses in their special editions is really cool, and continues to get cooler. Like the art box bundle of Gurren Lagann coming out next month comes with Simon's drill key.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Oct 16, 2008 4:28 am Iron Rooster wrote: A German dub? I wonder how the Asuka's German goes in those parts?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Wed Oct 29, 2008 4:43 am Probably not. Tiffany Grant said she'd like to dub Asuka again in Rebuild, tho. :( And so did Spike Spencer. As Shinji, obvs.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Wed Oct 29, 2008 8:55 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: How many languages is Evangelion currently dubbed in?

If they did dub it, that means that a release shouldn't be too far off.
